<~"FROM".ts~>

        <:import:>
            import <| <<name:up>> <||> { <<name:up>> } |> from <<"FROM".ts>> <| ; <||> \n |>
        <:>

        <:class:>
            class <<NAME:up>> ( <? <| , <||> <<NAME:down>> |> ?> ) { <-function, class, refference, variable-> }
        <:>

        <:function:>
            function <<NAME:up>> ( <? <| , <||> <<NAME:down>> |> ?> ) { <-function_-> }
        <:>

        <:variable:>
            let <<NAME>> <? = <<'name'>> ?> ;
        <:>

        <:refference:>   
            <<'name'>> . <<![class|function]name!>> (  <? <| , <||> |> <<'name'>>  ?> ) ;
        <:>

<~>
